title: Java Garbage Collection Lifecycle
description: A flowchart illustrating the lifecycle of objects in memory and the garbage collection process in Java, showing how objects become eligible for collection and how the garbage collector reclaims memory.
elements: Object in Use (Strongly Referenced in Young Generation)
Surviving Object (Moved to Survivor Space/Old Gen)
relationships: Objects are created in Eden space
Active references keep objects in memory
Lost references make objects eligible for collection
Minor GC collects young generation, promotes survivors
Major GC collects old generation when full
